mapper.select: SELECT id, name, pid, weight, ancestor_path, level FROM dept WHERE ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT(#{ancestorPath}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE dept SET ancestor_path = CONCAT(#{ancestorPath}, SUBSTRING(ancestor_path, LENGTH(#{curPath}) + 1)), level = level + #{levelDiff} WHERE ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT(#{curPath}, '%')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dept WHERE ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT(#{ancestorPath}, '%') OR id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT d.* FROM dept d WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM dept child WHERE child.pid = d.id );
SELECT d.* FROM dept d LEFT JOIN dept child ON child.pid = d.id WHERE child.id IS NULL;

WITH RECURSIVE tree AS ( SELECT * FROM dept WHERE id = #{id} -- 某个子树的的顶级ID UNION ALL SELECT d.* FROM dept d INNER JOIN tree t ON d.pid = t.id ) SELECT t.* FROM tree t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM dept d WHERE d.pid = t.id );

WITH RECURSIVE tree AS ( -- 1. 根节点（第1层） SELECT id, name, pid, 1 AS level FROM dept WHERE pid = 0
UNION ALL
-- 2. 递归向下找子节点 SELECT d.id, d.name, d.pid, t.level + 1 FROM dept d INNER JOIN tree t ON d.pid = t.id ) SELECT * FROM tree WHERE level = #{level}; -- 指定层级

-- 查某个子树的第 N 层 WITH RECURSIVE tree AS (SELECT id, name, pid, 1 AS level FROM dept WHERE id = #{id} -- 指定根节点
UNION ALL
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.pid, t.level + 1 FROM dept d JOIN tree t ON d.pid = t.id) SELECT * FROM tree WHERE level = #{level} -- 查某个子树的第三层

WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( -- 1. 起点（根节点） SELECT id, name, pid, weight, CAST(id AS CHAR(200)) AS path, 0 AS level FROM dept WHERE id = 1 -- 查 id = 3 的所有子节点
UNION ALL
-- 2. 递归找子节点 SELECT d.id, d.name, d.pid, d.weight, CONCAT(dt.path, '/', d.id) AS path, dt.level + 1 FROM dept d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.pid = dt.id )
SELECT * FROM dept_tree WHERE id = #{id} -- ORDER BY path; #按照层级排序，树矮的在前面
